theme: Optical Fibre & Telecom Infrastructure Build-out (5G + AI Data Centres)
why: India's 5G rollout, BharatNet expansion, and surging AI-driven data-centre fibre demand are driving record order books for optical fibre cable and telecom equipment makers.

early.why: Fibre network operator; BharatNet execution upside
State-owned telecom gear maker, order pipeline building
Data-centre connectivity; under-reacted to fibre theme

theme: Renewable Energy Capex — Solar Generation & Equipment
why: India added a record 44.6 GW of solar in FY26 and PM Surya Ghar rooftop scheme is accelerating installations, re-rating solar developers and equipment suppliers.

early.why: Largest solar module maker; manufacturing PLI tailwind
Borosil Renewables; only listed solar glass maker
TOPCon cell pioneer; Mission 2028 capex ramp

why: China+1 sourcing, recovering domestic volumes, and a new EV battery-chemicals upcycle are triggering earnings upgrades across Indian specialty chemical names.

early.why: Amine/pharma chem; earnings trough likely past
Green-process specialty chem; battery electrolyte play
Aroma chemicals; China+1 export recovery underway
Oleochemicals; margin recovery, low institutional ownership

theme: Capital Goods & Wire/Cable Infra Capex Supercycle
why: Record government and private capex on power T&D, railways, defence, and construction is driving order inflows for cables, pumps, and industrial equipment makers.

early.why: Power conductor & cable; T&D capex direct play
Wires & cables; order book at multi-year high
PVC cables; large-cap laggard in cable rally
Industrial motors; power infra capex beneficiary
